translations.en: a lively soul of a gypsy, with a bit of a wild look to him.
translations.zh: 活力充沛的吉普賽人，眼神中帶著幾分野性。

translations.en: "Anyone who would mistreat a dog has no business with Zoltan."
translations.zh: 「凡虐待狗的人，皆無資格與佐爾坦打交道。」

translations.en: "Hah! You again! You are no friend to Zoltan."
translations.zh: 「哈！又是你！你不是佐爾坦的朋友。」

translations.en: "I dance for you, and how do you repay me?"
translations.zh: 「吾為你獻舞，你如何回報？」

translations.en: "Perhaps a few coins might ease the sting of your insult."
translations.zh: 「也許幾枚金幣能撫慰你的冒犯之傷。」

translations.en: Do you give him any money?
translations.zh: 你是否給他一些錢？

translations.en: "So be it. Leave me before I place a gypsy curse on you!"
translations.zh: 「既如此。離開，否則吾將對你施下吉普賽詛咒！」

translations.en: "Huzzah! I am @Zoltan, king of the gypsies!"
translations.zh: 「哈哈！吾乃@佐爾坦，吉普賽人之王！」

translations.en: "Huzzah! I am still @Zoltan, king of the gypsies!"
translations.zh: 「哈哈！吾依然是@佐爾坦，吉普賽人之王！」

translations.en: "As I said, I am Zoltan, @king of the @gypsies!"
translations.zh: 「如吾所言，吾乃佐爾坦，@吉普賽人之@王！」

translations.en: "Yes, Zoltan, @king of the @gypsies!"
translations.zh: 「是的，佐爾坦，@吉普賽人之@王！」

translations.en: "I have no lands nor @castles, as most rulers do. Nay, for I am the king of the open @road."
translations.zh: 「吾無@城堡也無土地，不似多數君主。不，因為吾是廣闊@道路之王。」

translations.en: "Arturos? Never heard of him."
translations.zh: 「阿圖羅斯？從未聽說過。」

translations.en: He licks his lips and smiles. "A duck? No, haven't seen any around here."
translations.zh: 他舔了舔嘴唇，笑著說：「鴨子？沒有，附近沒見過。」

translations.en: "You cannot tie a gypsy down to a single place."
translations.zh: 「吉普賽人是無法被束縛在一處的。」

translations.en: "We are free @spirits, and must roam like the @wind throughout the land."
translations.zh: 「吾等是自由的@靈魂，必須如@風般遊蕩於大地之上。」

translations.en: "The roads @wander everywhere, just like a gypsy!"
translations.zh: 「道路@延伸至四方，正如吉普賽人！」

translations.en: "The four winds - they are gypsies too!"
translations.zh: 「四方之風——它們也是吉普賽人！」

translations.en: "As a gypsy's body wanders, so does his mind."
translations.zh: 「吉普賽人的身軀流浪，其心靈亦如是。」

translations.en: "Just now I am thinking of what you might @buy from me today."
translations.zh: 「此刻吾正在想你今日要向我@購買何物。」

translations.en: "Aye, my spirit is free, but my @advice is not."
translations.zh: 「是的，吾的靈魂是自由的，但吾的@建議可不免費。」

translations.en: "Ask my people for @advice, or what they have to @sell."
translations.zh: 「去問吾的族人要@建議，或看看他們有什麼可@賣。」

translations.en: "Gypsies see and hear much, and occasionally happen across items of interest..."
translations.zh: 「吉普賽人見多識廣，偶爾也會發現些有趣的物件……」

translations.en: "He's the lowest scum I ever met."
translations.zh: 「他是吾見過的最低賤之人。」

translations.en: "It's no place for an honest soul like you."
translations.zh: 「那不是像你這樣誠實之人該去的地方。」

translations.en: "But if you're determined to go, I hear it's on an island due east of @Paws."
translations.zh: 「但若你執意要去，聽說那在@帕斯正東方的島上。」

translations.en: "We pass Paws often in our travels. @Taynith likes to go drinking there."
translations.zh: 「吾等旅行時常經過帕斯。@泰妮絲喜歡去那裡喝酒。」

translations.en: "It's on the same island as @Moonglow."
translations.zh: 「它和@月輝城在同一座島上。」

translations.en: "It's on the same island as the @Lycaeum."
translations.zh: 「它和@萊西厄姆在同一座島上。」

translations.en: "She knows how to be generous to poor wandering gypsies. You should follow her example!"
translations.zh: 「她知道如何善待可憐的流浪吉普賽人。你也應該效法她！」

translations.en: "Captain John? I talked to him when he gave us the silver tablet for @Mariah."
translations.zh: 「約翰船長？當他把銀板交給吾等帶給@瑪麗亞時，吾曾與他說話。」

translations.en: "He's madder than a gremlin! Claims as he's been living with the gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「他比小妖精還瘋！聲稱自己一直和魔像族生活在一起。」

translations.en: "He talks as if there's nothing evil about them."
translations.zh: 「他說起他們，就好像他們毫無邪惡之處。」

translations.en: "He said the tablet had something to do with translating."
translations.zh: 「他說那塊石板與翻譯有關。」

translations.en: "Either you're a gorgio or my name's not @Zoltan!"
translations.zh: 「你要麼是個外人，要麼我的名字就不叫@佐爾坦！」

translations.en: "There are no women like gypsy women!"
translations.zh: 「天下無女子能與吉普賽女子相比！」

translations.en: "Farewell! My fellow gypsies and I will @dance to your health and good fortune!"
translations.zh: 「再見！吾與族人將@跳舞，祝你身體健康、鴻運當頭！」

translations.en: "Farewell."
translations.zh: 「再見。」

translations.en: @Karina produces a fiddle from somewhere and begins to play a tune at a very high tempo.
translations.zh: @卡麗娜不知從何處取出一把小提琴，開始飛速演奏。

translations.en: Zoltan dances a wild dance for you, leaping and capering about frantically.
translations.zh: 佐爾坦為你跳起狂野的舞蹈，縱身跳躍、瘋狂旋轉。

translations.en: His chest glistens with sweat as he walks up to you expectantly.
translations.zh: 他胸前汗光閃閃，滿懷期待地走近你。

translations.en: "Why worry yourself with that?"
translations.zh: 「何必為此煩惱？」

translations.en: "Perhaps you'd like to look over some of the fine @reagents I have for sale."
translations.zh: 「也許你想看看吾販售的上等@施法材料。」

translations.en: "Tell you what. Since I'm in a good mood, I'll only charge you two gold coins. Is it a deal?"
translations.zh: 「這樣吧。吾今日心情好，只收兩枚金幣。成交？」

translations.en: "Whatever you say."
translations.zh: 「隨你。」

translations.en: "Come back when you're not so down on your luck."
translations.zh: 「等你運氣不這麼差的時候再來。」

translations.en: "I'll tell you this:"
translations.zh: 「吾告訴你：」

translations.en: "Powder kegs are useful for persuading uncooperative doors to open."
translations.zh: 「火藥桶對付頑固的門非常有用。」

translations.en: "I'd be glad to help you out. But 'tis a hard life, sometimes, being a gypsy."
translations.zh: 「吾很樂意幫你。但有時候，吉普賽人的生活也頗艱難。」

translations.en: "You'd be willing to pay ten gold for the information, would you?"
translations.zh: 「你願意付十枚金幣換取這個消息，對嗎？」

translations.en: "Let me know if you change your mind."
translations.zh: 「若改變主意，告訴吾一聲。」

translations.en: "Come back when you have the money."
translations.zh: 「等你有錢了再來。」

translations.en: "Some @gorgio called 'Captain @John' brought us the silver tablet and paid us to take it to the Lycaeum."
translations.zh: 「一個叫『@約翰船長』的@外人帶來銀板，並付錢請吾等將它帶到萊西厄姆。」

translations.en: "While we were on the way there, we were ambushed by Captain @Hawkins and his crew."
translations.zh: 「在途中，吾等遭到@霍金斯船長及其手下的埋伏。」

translations.en: The tablet was broken in two during the scuffle. The pirates got away with the bigger half."
translations.zh: 石板在混戰中斷為兩截。海盜帶走了較大的那半塊。」
translations.note: 注意：本行開頭無引號，是敘述接對話

translations.en: "Hawkins took my finest earring as well - I spit on his mother's grave!"
translations.zh: 「霍金斯還奪走了吾最珍貴的耳環——吾唾他母親的墳！」

translations.en: "Most likely they went to Buccaneer's @Den with their loot."
translations.zh: 「他們多半帶著贓物去了海盜@巢穴。」

translations.en: "We took the corner of the tablet that they missed to the @Lycaeum and sold it to @Mariah."
translations.zh: 「吾等把他們沒拿走的那角石板帶到@萊西厄姆，賣給了@瑪麗亞。」

translations.en: Do you give him any money?
translations.zh: 你是否給他一些錢？

translations.en: "Hah! I should know better than to expect a gorgio to appreciate a fine gypsy dance."
translations.zh: 「哈！吾本不該奢望一個外人欣賞精彩的吉普賽舞蹈。」

translations.en: Proudly, he turns his back on you.
translations.zh: 他驕傲地轉過身去。

translations.en: How much do you give?
translations.zh: 你給多少錢？

translations.en: You don't have that much.
translations.zh: 你沒有那麼多錢。

translations.en: Zoltan pockets the money. "Thanks."
translations.zh: 佐爾坦將錢揣入口袋。「謝了。」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「你們哪位？」

translations.en: "What else would you like to know?"
translations.zh: 「你還想知道什麼？」

translations.en: "Which of these?"
translations.zh: 「要哪一項？」

translations.en: "$1 costs #1 per portion."
translations.zh: 「$1每份#1枚金幣。」

translations.en: "How many do you want?"
translations.zh: 「要幾份？」

translations.en: $N hands $Y the $1.
translations.zh: $N遞給$Y$1。

translations.en: "You can't carry that much!"
translations.zh: 「你帶不了那麼多！」

translations.en: "I'll just give you #5."
translations.zh: 「那吾就給你#5份。」

translations.en: "You can't carry any!"
translations.zh: 「你什麼都帶不了！」

translations.en: "You can't afford that much!"
translations.zh: 「你負擔不起那麼多！」

translations.en: "I'll give you #5."
translations.zh: 「那吾給你#5份。」

translations.en: "You can't afford any $1!"
translations.zh: 「你買不起任何$1！」

translator_notes: 佐爾坦是吉普賽王，豪放熱情，自稱「吾」。涉及銀板（silver tablet）劇情線索（Captain John/Hawkins/Mariah）。gorgio（非吉普賽人）譯為「外人」。施法材料名（Blood Moss等）為系統字串，不翻譯。
